nasb.text: When the angel who was speaking to him had left, he summoned two of his servants and a devout soldier of those who were his personal attendants,

esv.text: When the angel who spoke to him had departed, he called two of his servants and a devout soldier from among those who attended him,

cnv.text: 和他說話的天使走了之後，他就叫了兩個家僕和侍候他的一個虔誠的士兵來，

ccb.text: 向他说话的天使离开后，哥尼流叫来两个家仆和自己的一个敬虔侍卫，

csbs.text: 向哥尼流说话的天使离开以后，哥尼流叫来两个家仆和常伺候他的一个敬神的士兵，
